terminals.name: emulator
terminals.description: Android emulator (API 34) used by Mobile MCP. Boots headless with software rendering. Use 'adb devices' to confirm it's online. Restart this pane if the emulator becomes unresponsive.

terminals.name: metro
terminals.description: React Native Metro bundler on :8081. Required for the app to load JS on the emulator. Hot reload works for JS/TS changes; native code changes require a rebuild via 'npm run android'.
